name: Deployment Validation
description: Comprehensive post-deployment validation of all Horizon Books Fabric items, connections, lakehouse tables, and Gold layer schema integrity.

tasks.name: List Workspace Items
tasks.description: Retrieve all items in the workspace via Fabric REST API to verify presence of expected Fabric artifacts.

tasks.name: Validate Item Presence
tasks.description: Check for existence of all 10+ expected items: 3 Lakehouses, 4 Notebooks, 3 Dataflows, 1 DataPipeline, 1 SemanticModel, 1 Report, 1 DataAgent (optional).

tasks.name: Validate Dataflow Connections
tasks.description: Verify all 3 DataFlow Gen2 connections are bound with OAuth2 credentials for data refresh capability.

tasks.name: Validate Lakehouse Tables
tasks.description: Check BronzeLH and SilverLH contain expected Delta tables from data ingestion and Bronze-to-Silver transformation.

tasks.name: Verify Gold Tables
tasks.description: Verify all 23 Gold tables exist in GoldLH across 3 schemas (dim: 10, fact: 8, analytics: 5) with correct columns via INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS queries.

tasks.name: Report Validation Summary
tasks.description: Generate pass/fail summary report for all validation checks with detailed status per item.
